zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Urswick於1340年出生在英國藍卡爾時，他的父親Adam Urswick35歲，母親Sarah Tatham21歲。他於大約1363年與Margaret Southworth在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1379年在英國藍卡爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1401年在英國英格蘭倫敦享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Urswick于1340年出生在英国藍卡爾时，他的父亲Adam Urswick35岁，母亲Sarah Tatham21岁。他于大约1363年与Margaret Southworth在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1379年在英国藍卡爾被列为member of parliament。他去世于1401年在英国英格兰倫敦享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Urswick was born in 1340, in Lancashire, England, his father, Adam Urswick, was 35 and his mother, Sarah Tatham, was 21. He married Margaret Southworth about 1363, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1379, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Lancashire, England. He died in 1401, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Urswick est né en 1340, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam Urswick, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Sarah Tatham, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Southworth environ 1363, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1379, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Lancashire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1401, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Urswick 1340 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Urswick 35 und seine Mutter Sarah Tatham 21. Er hat um 1363 in Lancashire, England Margaret Southworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1379 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament in Lancashire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1401 im Alter von 61 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Urswick è nato il nel 1340 nel Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Adam Urswick, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Tatham, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Southworth circa 1363, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1379, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Lancashire, England. Morì nel 1401, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Urswickが1340年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Adam Urswickは35歳，母Sarah Tathamは21歳であった。約1363年にイギリスランカシュアイアでMargaret Southworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1379年，イギリスランカシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1401年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Urswick(이)가 1340년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Urswick(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Tatham(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1363년 영국 랭카실르에서 Margaret Southworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1379년, 그의 직업은 영국 랭카실르에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Urswick nasceu em 1340, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Urswick, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Tatham, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Southworth aproximadamente 1363, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1379, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1401, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Urswick родился в 1340 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam Urswick было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Tatham, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Southworth около 1363 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1379 году он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности ланкашир, Англия. Он умер в 1401 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Urswick nació en 1340, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Urswick, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Sarah Tatham, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Southworth aproximadamente 1363, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1379, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1401, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
